name: Last Question
short_description: "Last Question" is a VR puzzle-solving game where you experience escaping from a locked room in first-person perspective.
detailed_description:
• You wake up in a mysterious room, greeted by a bloodied mask that warns you: escape before 12 o'clock, or face a terrifying fate. To break free, you'll need to solve a series of challenging puzzles.

  • The mask’s games are based on different types of questions, including logic, astronomy, and mathematics. Successfully completing these tasks will reveal parts of a secret code you need to escape.

  • Time is of the essence! If you fail, the clock speeds up, making each second count. Your time to escape is recorded, and you can compete for the fastest completion time.

  • Supports Pico, SteamVR, and Oculus Quest.

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
